zh.title: 华生选择任务
zh.description: 这是一个经典的逻辑推理任务，测试你对条件推理的理解。
zh.question: 桌上有四张卡片，每张卡片的一面是数字，另一面是字母。规则是：如果卡片的一面是元音字母（A, E, I, O, U），那么另一面一定是偶数。现在你看到的卡片是：A, K, 4, 7。请问你需要翻开哪几张卡片来验证这个规则是否正确？
zh.hint: 思考一下：什么情况会让规则不成立？

en.title: Wason Selection Task
en.description: This is a classic logical reasoning task testing your understanding of conditional inference.
en.question: There are four cards on the table. Each card has a number on one side and a letter on the other. The rule is: If a card has a vowel (A, E, I, O, U) on one side, it must have an even number on the other side. The cards you see are: A, K, 4, 7. Which cards do you need to turn over to test if the rule holds?
en.hint: Think: What would make the rule false?
